content.text: Generate an image of Microsoft logo.

output.revised_prompt: Create a high-resolution, accurate depiction of the Microsoft logo: four equal-sized squares arranged in a 2x2 grid. Colors should match the official Microsoft palette—top-left red (#F25022), top-right green (#7FBA00), bottom-left blue (#00A4EF), bottom-right yellow (#FFB900). Flat, minimal, vector-style with sharp edges, no gradients, no shadows, and no outlines. Center the logo on a transparent background. Canvas size 1024x1024 pixels. Do not include any text, watermark, or additional elements.
